## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 15, Pixel 8]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 17, Android 14]
- App version: [e.g. 1.0.0]
